meaning: n.<法>侍者(通常用作对餐馆服务员的直接称呼),男孩,未婚男子,男雇员
examples: Marcus: Garcon, a nice cup of tea for this lady here.
I noticed this myself, shrugged, and found a restaurant called au Petit Garcon in a village on slope of the Vosges.
The Colts' lone touchdown came on a 57-yard pass from Mr. Manning to Pierre Garcon in the second quarter.
